description_long: This lounge set features a modern black sofa with a boxy silhouette, accented by two matching black throw pillows and supported by slim, tapered wooden legs. Adjacent to the sofa is a plush, maroon armchair with a rounded back and armrests, offering a cozy and inviting seating option. In front of the seating area, two round, nested wooden coffee tables of different heights are placed atop a large, light gray area rug. The sofa's upholstery appears to be a soft, slightly textured fabric, while the armchair has a velvety finish. The coffee tables have a smooth, dark wood surface, providing a sturdy platform for items. This arrangement is ideal for urban lounges, waiting areas, or stylish public spaces.
description: A modern black sofa with matching pillows, a maroon velvet armchair, and two round wooden coffee tables on a light gray rug create a stylish lounge set.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full black sofa, maroon armchair, both coffee tables, and the area rug.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa, the armchair's back, and the nested arrangement of the coffee tables.
description_view_2: Rear view of the sofa, showing its solid back, the armchair's side, and the tops of the coffee tables.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the armchair's shape, the sofa's side, and the coffee tables' placement on the rug.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Sofa has two loose back cushions and two matching throw pillows; seat cushion is a single, continuous piece. Armchair has an integrated seat and back cushion.
attribute_backrest_design: Sofa backrest is straight, medium height, and features subtle tufting; armchair backrest is rounded and curves into the armrests for a cocooning effect.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both sofa and armchair have armrests; sofa armrests are straight and boxy, armchair armrests are curved and integrated into the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are slim, tapered, and wooden with a slight outward angle, providing a modern and elevated look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Sofa upholstery is solid black with subtle tufting; armchair is solid maroon with a velvety texture; no visible patterns on the coffee tables or rug.
